channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Solid-state batteries still aren’t ready, but gels are
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on e-bikes, power stations, and how to work anywhere, follow Thomas Ricker. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Lithium-ion batteries are everywhere as we […]

item.title: 20 Best Gifts for Men, Manly Men, and Menly Man Men (2026)
item.description: When you need something that’s as mannishly masculinized as you can get for the Man™ in your life, we have you covered.

item.title: 'You're designing for a dynamic range of sizes and aspect ratios': Apple keeps on dropping hints that an iPhone Fold is on the way
item.description: We think the folding iPhone will launch in September, but it's not official yet — despite these signs from Apple.

item.title: HP ENVY x360 : le laptop hybride perd 150 € sur son prix d’origine
item.description: Boulanger propose une réduction intéressante sur le PC portable hybride HP ENVY x360. Cet ordinateur 2-en-1 passe de 799,99 euros à 649,99 euros, une opportunité pour s'équiper à moindres frais.

item.title: Cet aspirateur-laveur Roborock d’une puissance de 20 000 Pa perd 150 € de son prix
item.description: Besoin de donner un coup de propre à vos sols sans vous compliquer la vie ? L'aspirateur-laveur Roborock F25 est celui qu'il vous faut. Noté 8/10 par nos soins, il coûte aujourd'hui seulement 249 euros contre 399 euros.

item.title: Ukrainian UAV expert warns US off-the-shelf drones will fail to survive EW, and 'every unit should have their own drone laboratory'
item.description: Ukrainian drone operators say battlefield success increasingly depends on constant modification, AI integration, and disrupting Russian logistics networks.

item.title: Flag Day 2026 explained: The origin and history of America’s most recognizable symbol
item.description: Flag Day always falls on June 14, but it’s not an official federal holiday. Here’s what to know. When Olympic athletes win, they are often covered in their home country’s flag. Symbols such as flags help unite the masses, reminding individuals of a bigger purpose. The flag of the United States of America is no exception to this rule.

item.title: 19 Best Gifts for Plant Lovers and Gardeners (2026)
item.description: From smart apps and planters to unique tools, these gifts will turn even a black thumb into a next-level plant parent.

item.title: The macOS 27 beta is already a 'mind-blowing' revelation for some MacBook owners — here are 3 reasons why it isn't the lowkey release it seems
item.description: The first beta of macOS 27 Golden Gate is seriously impressing testers with its stability and performance levels, along with vital interface changes.

item.title: Suunto Spark Review: The Perfect Pair for Runs and Rides
item.description: Suunto swaps bone for air conduction, giving these open-ear earbuds a perfect fit for the great outdoors.

item.title: How to watch India vs Pakistan: live stream Women's T20 World Cup 2026 free from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch India vs Pakistan at the 2026 Women's T20 World Cup from anywhere in the world, including free options.

item.title: Half of workers worry AI will still take their job — as new report claims use of agents soars 90% in just a year
item.description: GMB Union data reveals 48% of workers fear AI job displacement, despite a 90% rise in agent usage as companies integrate AI tools.

item.title: Console portable et mini-PC à la fois : le pari de la X2 Mini Pro
item.description: OneXPlayer dévoile le prix de sa X2 Mini Pro : une console portable sous Ryzen AI Max+ 388 qui vise les 1 000 FPS comme les LLM en local. À partir de 2 399 dollars, soit le prix d’un très bon PC fixe.
